changes: Reduced response latency
Refined UI animations
Fixed routing-related bugs
Added skip option for API setup
Improved response quality
Refined AI prompts for better contextual understanding
Fixed API-related bugs
Integrated full website ecosystem
Launched Academic Oracle AI Learning System
Integrated Quiz Platform with closed-feedback learning loop
Unified routing architecture with route-driven state management
Implemented multi-model fallback chain with dynamic load balancing
Improved Socratic dialogue flow and adaptive reasoning depth
Enhanced session summaries with contextual memory refinement
Reduced model error rates and improved response reliability
Separated quota handling between Chat and Quiz systems
Smoothed UI transitions and interaction flows
Upgraded Arcade demos, documentation, and release structure
Better UI/UX chat handling with smoother interaction logic
Improved multi-language support and localization handling
Smoothed Socratic dialogue flow with enhanced reasoning continuity
More robust and reliable chatbot responses across edge cases
Enhanced conversational stability and adaptive response depth
Refined overall system polish and response consistency
Introduced race-based model routing for faster and more adaptive response selection
Significantly improved system resilience and failure recovery handling
Integrated StepFun 3.5 model into the adaptive routing pipeline
Preserved draft prompts and responses across tab switches and unexpected closures
Enhanced overall session stability under high-load conditions
Refined chat input UI to dynamically expand on multiline input without covering conversation content
Enhanced adaptive prompt logic for both chat and quiz modes with improved confidence-based pacing
Expanded Socratic engine techniques to include flip questioning, verification checks, practical applications, theoretical framing, and abstract reasoning transitions
Improved guided-thinking flow to better scale difficulty before escalation
Strengthened response coherence and instructional stability across varying learner profiles
Enhanced Socratic learning prompts with deeper guided reasoning, encouraging learners to derive concepts before explanation and reinforcing reflection through self-checking
Expanded mathematics and science teaching support with clearer step-by-step reasoning, conceptual scaffolding, and built-in verification checks
Improved instructional flow and adaptive pacing to smoothly transition between intuition, formal explanation, and practical application while preventing cognitive overload
Reduced formatting and rendering inconsistencies by tightening response structure for equations, lists, and technical explanations while improving prompt stability
Migrated entire AI orchestration layer to Supabase Edge Functions, achieving zero-client exposure of API keys and implementing AES-GCM-256 encryption for production-grade security.
Introduced a context-aware 'Explain on Select' feature, allowing students to trigger Socratic follow-ups and deep-dives directly from highlighted text without breaking learning flow.
Integrated JigsawStack Web Search API to provide real-time factual grounding and high-fidelity parsing of dynamic web content, overcoming LLM training cutoffs.
Developed a multi-modal execution pipeline with five specialized routing modes (Standard, Fast, Balanced, Agentic, Web Search) to optimize for query complexity and latency.
Implemented a dedicated Prompt Security Layer featuring jailbreak detection, input sanitation, and response shaping to maintain pedagogical integrity and prevent misuse.
Enhanced UI transparency with a real-time Loading Status Text Bar, providing learners with visibility into the AI's current cognitive state and processing stage.
Upgraded core tech stack to React 19, Vite 6, and TypeScript 5.8, while implementing a non-blocking UI architecture for graceful degradation and error handling.
